pageContext.name: The Bat and The Cat
pageContext.description: It was you and me. No costumes. Just the two of us.   Sideshow Art Prints presents The Bat and the Cat Fine Art Print, an eye-catching DC Comics art print by artist Clay Mann.  Wings and claws chasing one another across the rooftops of Gotham — Selina Kyle and Bruce Wayne are caught in a perpetual game of Cat and Bat. The rogue cat burglar has stolen Batman's heart on many an occasion, and the Dark Knight has brought Catwoman into the light time and again. This purple-tinged portrait shows the famous pair leaping into action, their paths to justice forever intertwined.  Originally created as a variant cover for Batman #79: Year of the Villain (2019), written by Tom King for DC Comics, this Batman comic artwork is now being offered to fans in a fine art presentation. Each The Bat and the Cat Fine Art Print features an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 375 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée or in a custom framed format, this other dynamic duo of Gotham City is a must-have for Batman wall art collectors.  Whether you're using a grappling gun or a bullwhip, be sure to capture The Bat and the Cat Fine Art Print by Clay Mann for your DC Comics collection today!
